mapper.select:
/** UsptUdstdprcpDao.selectList */ select udstdprcp_id , evl_plan_id , nm , gender_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('GENDER', gender_cd) as gender_nm , instt_nm , last_schul , subjct , enc_brthdy , enc_mbtlnum , bizrno , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_udstdprcp where 1 = 1 and evl_plan_id = #{evlPlanId}
and udstdprcp_id = #{udstdprcpId}
